dedicated_apps.description:
LEARN GUITAR – LESSONS WITH 2M+ HAPPY USERS
Learn guitar easily with Justin Guitar, the ultimate guitar learning app, created by the world’s best guitar teacher - JUSTIN SANDERCOE.

Trusted by over 1 million learners, Justin’s proven method guides you from your first chord to your favorite songs – with real results that users love!

Designed for complete beginners, this app leverages on Justin’s 20+ years of teaching experience and makes learning guitar simple and fun.

WHY YOU’LL LOVE JUSTIN GUITAR 
1. Learn with a Proven Method
- Structured learning path that guides you step-by-step 
- Keeps you practicing consistently from absolute beginner to confident player
- 2.4 million app downloads/ students worldwide
- Course level covers beginner Grade 1, 2 & 3!

2. Engaging, Bite-Size Lessons
- 210 video lessons (36+ hours total) designed for all beginners
- Short, easy-to-follow modules that fit any schedule
- Learn what to practice, how long, and when to progress
- Daily Practice Routine combines all key exercises into a simple 10-minute plan

3. Interactive Tools for Real Progress
- Interactive exercises to strengthen your skills
- One-Minute-Chord Change exercises for speed and accuracy
- Color-chord system for faster chord learning
- Easy-to-use guitar tuner
- Progress tracking to keep your learning journey on track

4. Play Songs You Love
- Over 1,500 hit songs 
- New songs added regularly
- Module songs matched to your skill level
- Songbook with chords filter
- Create playlists, auto-play, and share

NEW SONG PLAYER UI
- Enhanced visuals and smoother navigation
- See the next chord with diagram or the strumming pattern 
- Display lyrics for easier sing-along
- Play with a full band sound and optional vocals for a “real stage” experience
- Adjustable tempo – slow down or speed up songs to practice at your own pace
- Strumming pattern exercises – practice and adjust strumming along with the song

YOUR PERSONAL GUITAR TEACHER
Justin’s friendly, engaging style makes learning fun and structured. Even tricky skills like chord changes and strumming feel easy to master — like having a personal guitar trainer.

EVERYTHING YOU NEED TO LEARN GUITAR IN ONE APP
All your guitar tools in one place: lessons, practice routines, songbook with chord filter, tuner, and a beginner-friendly song player. Learn, practice, and play your favorite songs while tracking your progress and building confidence every day.

Millions of learners worldwide love how Justin Guitar makes guitar simple and effective — start your journey today and see how far you can go!

We’d love to hear your feedback - email us at justin.ios.feedback@musopia.net
 
*Not optimized for Apple Mac*
*Minimum requirements for this app:
- iPhone 6S or later (2015+)
- iPad 5th generation or later (2017+)
- iPad mini 4th generation or later (2015+)
- iPad Air 2nd generation or later (2014+)
- iPad Pro (2015+)
- iOS 15.0 or later
 
Important subscription information
 
Justin Guitar offers several FULL ACCESS subscription packages that unlock unlimited access to the entire song collection of Playground and all the stages of the Guitar Learning Path. New song releases are also included.
 
Subscription purchases are charged to your iTunes account upon confirmation of the purchase. All subscriptions will AUTOMATICALLY be renewed unless the auto-renew is turned off at least 24 hours prior to the end of the current period. Your iTunes account will be charged a renewal price equal to that of the original subscription within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period.
 
You can manage your subscriptions and turn off auto-renew by going to your Account Settings after the purchase. Subscriptions are non-refundable and may not be cancelled during an active subscription period.
 
Our privacy policy can be found at http://musopia.net/justin-privacypolicy
Terms of use: https://musopia.net/terms

dedicated_apps.description:
Reach your musical goals with Andante, the practice companion app for musicians. By combining essential practice tools like metronome, session tracking, as well as motivation features like practice streaks, Andante helps you stay organized and motivated. Made by a musician for musicians.

** Log your practice **
Practice live with a timer, metronome, done tuner, and audio recorder or manually add sessions with ease. Logging your practice helps you visualize your progress and give you a space to write down anything related to your practice session. You can also track your practice time on specific pieces of music, and log your mood and focus during your session to give yourself a chance to reflect.

** Build a habit **
Andante helps you build the habit of practicing every day with motivational features like practice streaks and daily goals.

** Visualize your progress **
See your progress with charts and calendar views. See when you have the best mood by seeing trends between mood and time of day, or if session length affects your focus.

** Sync between iPhone and iPad **
Andante uses iCloud sync to privately sync your data across your devices, without needing to make an account.

** Built to integrate with your device **
With Siri Shortcuts, Home Screen and Control Widgets, Calendar syncing, and more.

** About the developer **
My name is Miles, and I’m a violinist. I originally started making Andante to help myself with my violin practice, as I found writing down the times and some notes on my practice sessions helped me stay motivated and less stressed. I hope that Andante can help with your practice journey!

Terms: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

Unlock Guitar Soloing & Learn to Improvise Like a Pro – Fast! JamTracks+ is the first dedicated lead guitar training app designed to turn boring scale practice into confident, musical soloing. It’s your ultimate backing band and structured training system in one — helping players stop noodling, break bad habits, and start soloing with flow.

Whether you’re a beginner who just wants to sound good fast or an intermediate stuck in scale pattern hell, Guitar Jam Tracks: Solo Pro shows you the way forward. Practice feels fun — like having a band and coach right on your phone.

As Seen In:
• “Top 25 Best Guitar Apps” – Guitar World
• “Essential Tools for Guitar” – WIRED Magazine
• “Best Apps of the Week” – Gizmodo
• “Best New Apps” – Apple
• “Top 5 Apps for Guitarists” – iPhoneAppCafe

Why Choose Guitar Jam Tracks: Solo Pro?
• Focus on creativity: Build soloing, phrasing, rhythm, and scale skills through purposeful jamming – no more random noodling!
• Proven Structure: Crush the 28-Day Challenge to go from beginner licks to flowing, pro-level solos in weeks.
• Musician-Made: Crafted with real teaching methods that deliver results – join thousands who’ve gained solo confidence.
• Stay Motivated: Track progress with streaks, milestones, and daily wins to keep you hooked.
• Fun for All Levels: New to guitar? Start simple. Returning player? Dive into advanced styles.

What’s Inside:
• True-to-Vibe Backing Tracks: Rock, blues, jazz, and more – across keys and styles for endless variety.
• Easy Scale Charts: Highlighted roots for quick reference while you improvise.
• Chord Sheets: For every track, so you understand the harmony.
• Loop Mode: Zero in on tricky sections for focused practice.
• Quick Key Switching: Adapt tracks to your comfort zone instantly.
• Progress Tracking: Build habits with streaks and achievements.
• Full 28-Day Challenge: Guided lessons to transform your playing – unlock your inner soloist!

Start Free Today – No Risk!
Kick off with a 3-Day Free Trial to access everything: All tracks, keys, scales, styles, and the 28-Day Challenge. Choose your plan:
• 1-Year Subscription (with 3-Day Free Trial)
• Lifetime Access (one-time purchase)

Payment charged to your Apple ID at confirmation. Subscriptions auto-renew unless canceled 24 hours before the period ends. Manage in iTunes Account Settings. Unused trial forfeits on purchase. Cancel anytime – your access lasts until the period ends.

Download Now & Start Soloing with Confidence – Your Free Trial Awaits!

dedicated_apps.description:
The best guitar learning app from Gibson.
Perfect if you’re looking for a fun guitar practice app that keeps you motivated.

Looking for the best way to learn guitar at home? Start with Gibson’s step-by-step learning path. Whether you’re picking up a guitar for the first time or leveling up your technique, the Gibson App helps you learn faster with interactive fun lessons, real songs, and real-time feedback. Join millions of guitar players learning with the Gibson App. 

Build real skills across all styles — from your first chords to full songs, fingerpicking, and music theory. New songs added weekly.

FEATURED IN TOP MUSIC MEDIA

“The Gibson App is changing the guitar teaching game.” — Rolling Stone

“For those just starting their guitar journey, the Gibson app will be a godsend. The quality of tuition is second to none.” — Guitar World

"The Best Guitar Learning App" - Creative Outlet

LEARN GUITAR FASTER WITH REAL-TIME FEEDBACK

The app listens to your guitar and gives you instant feedback on your playing, helping you improve timing and technique with every session. Guitar lessons, real songs, interactive tabs, tuner, metronome, and real-time feedback — all in one app.

10,000+ LESSONS, EXERCISES & SONGS

Explore a massive library of lessons and songs across multiple genres, including rock, blues, metal, pop, acoustic, and more.

MASTER EVERY GUITAR SKILL

Go beyond basic chords with a curriculum that covers proper finger placement, strumming patterns, lead guitar, fingerpicking, and music theory. Whether you want to read tabs or understand the fretboard, our world-class teachers guide you from beginner to pro across all genres.

See your guitar skills grow in real-time with detailed tracking across 300+ techniques, chords, and playing styles—turning invisible practice into measurable mastery.

STEP-BY-STEP LEARNING PATH (BEGINNER TO PRO)

Follow a fun learning journey created by professional guitar teachers. You’ll always know what to practice next, with lessons designed to keep you progressing.

EVERYTHING YOU NEED TO LEARN & PLAY GUITAR

- Guitar tuner 

- Metronome

- Tempo control and looping tools

- Training Calendar to build a consistent routine

TURN YOUR IPHONE/IPAD INTO AN AMPLIFIER

Explore guitar sound effects, play along with your favorite music. Practice with an electric or acoustic guitar.

JOIN THE COMMUNITY

Connect with fellow guitar learners, get access to pro-level guidance, tips, and inspiration.

WATCH GIBSON TV

Gibson TV is packed with original series on guitars, music, and culture. Watch, and get inspired by legendary players and iconic stories.

NEW TO GUITAR?

- Is the Gibson App good for complete beginners?
Yes. The Gibson App is designed to help complete beginners learn guitar from scratch with step-by-step lessons and a fun learning path.

- Can I learn guitar on my own?
Absolutely. The app is built for self-learners and helps you stay consistent with guided lessons and a Training Calendar.

- Does it work with acoustic and electric guitar?
Yes. The Gibson App works with any guitar.

- Does the app teach real songs?
Yes. Learn real songs with interactive tabs and video lessons.

- Why should I choose Gibson app?
Gibson is the best guitar learning app. Ask our users!

HOW THE GIBSON APP WORKS

- The app listens to your guitar and gives you feedback

- Play along with fun lessons and easy-to-follow tablature

- Advance at your own pace through the step-by-step learning

FREE TRIAL

Day 1: Start free trial
Day 1 - 7: Full access to all lessons, songs, features
Day 7: Subscription begins unless canceled
Cancel anytime during the free trial, you won’t be charged

ABOUT

The Gibson App is developed by Zoundio, a music-tech company based in Stockholm, Sweden, in collaboration with Gibson.

CONTACT

Have feedback, questions or suggestions? Contact us at app.support@gibson.com 

By downloading this app, you agree to Apple's Terms of Use: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

dedicated_apps.description:
GuitarTuna is your go-to guitar app, with over 100 million downloads and counting! Tune your guitar in seconds with the free guitar tuner, explore guitar chords & tabs for 20,000+ songs, and learn how to play guitar songs you love with trainers, tutorials & personalized feedback.

Why you’ll love GuitarTuna
• Tune any guitar, ukulele, violin or bass perfectly with easy-to-use tuning
• Switch seamlessly between guitar tuner, ukulele tuner, bass tuner & more
• Get guitar tabs & chords for your favorite songs
• Learn guitar songs with trainers, tutorials & personalized feedback
• Practice like a pro with essential tools for guitar
• Play songs you love at any skill level – guitar beginners included!
• Become a better guitar player with an all-in-one guitar app in your pocket

How it works
• Just pluck a string on your instrument and GuitarTuna detects the sound using your device’s microphone.
• You’ll get instant visual feedback while tuning. No cables needed.
• With our audio recognition technology, you’ll get insanely accurate tuning. Noise cancellation technology eliminates background noises while you tune.

Learn songs with guitar tutorials
• Learn guitar songs with video tutorials & interactive trainers
• Get personalized feedback to improve your guitar playing
• Create your own personalized learning path
• Get tips from expert guitarists

Play songs with guitar tabs & chords
• Explore guitar tabs for 20,000+ popular songs by top global artists
• Get pro-quality guitar chords & guitar tabs
• Choose guitar tabs & chords for your skill level
• Play at your own pace while chords & tabs sync with you
• Request guitar tabs & chords for your favorite songs
• New guitar songs & tabs added weekly!

Tools to practice guitar like a pro
• Metronome: Set your tempo & customize your time signature with the metronome tool
• Chord games: G chord giving you trouble? Learn, practice & master guitar chords with customizable games.
• Ear trainer: Improve your music skills & recognize chords by ear
• Chord library: Explore guitar chords with diagrams & audio
• Left-hand mode: Easily switch between right & left hand modes

Instruments
• Guitar
• Guitar 7-String
• Guitar 12-String
• Ukulele
• Cavaquinho
• Bass
• Bass 5-string
• Violin
• Viola
• Cello
• Fiddle
• Mandolin
• Balalaika
• Banjo
• Banjo 5-String

We’ve put a lot of love and effort into making GuitarTuna the tuner it is today. Your feedback is valuable to us, and you can be sure we’re listening. We recently added pro-quality guitar song chords and lyrics to the app because of the sheer amount of requests for them. Play your favorite songs anywhere, anytime, with our entire song library produced by professional musicians.

GuitarTuna Pro subscription: Subscribe for unlimited access. Subscriptions are monthly. Prices may vary in different countries. Payment will be charged to iTunes Account. Subscription automatically renews unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24-hours before the end of the current period. Account will be charged for renewal within 24-hours prior to the end of the current period. Subscriptions may be managed by the user and auto-renewal may be turned off by going to the user’s iTunes Account Settings. Any unused portion of a free trial period will be forfeited when the user purchases a subscription.

GuitarTuna is developed by Yousician. Check out Yousician’s apps to learn and master guitar, ukulele, bass, piano or singing!

It’s pretty cool you actually read this far! Here’s a joke for you: What’s the difference between a bass and a tuna? You can tuna bass, but you can’t bass a tuna!

Now download the app and see how it is.
Send us your feedback on the joke and the app to support@guitartuna.com!

Playing the guitar has never been easier with #1 guitar playing app! Learn chords and create music right on you device! 

You’ve just come up with the greatest riff of all time and can’t wait to rock it out. But your trusty Gibson Les Paul or Yamaha is not at hand and there’s no guitar center or even a small guitar store in sight…. A nightmare way too familiar to any guitar player. Worry not for Real Guitar app got your back! 

Real Guitar is one of the most realistic guitar simulator apps featuring a user-friendly interface and an awesome sound quality. All sounds have been recorded from live guitar. With the help of Real Guitar you can easily strum, pluck, and strike the strings to play the chords of any complexity and figure out your favourite tunes or make up your own. You can learn and master new chords and jingles with Real Guitar, as well. 

◆◆◆ Main Features ◆◆◆

Different Types of Guitars

◉ Classical Guitar
◉ Acoustic Guitar
◉ Electric Guitar
◉ 12 String Guitar

Guitar Playing Modes

◉ Left Handed Guitar
◉ Right Handed Guitar
◉ Various Strumming Patterns (pick, fingers)
◉ Solo Note animation (see which notes you play on the go)
◉ Guitar Chords Mode (great way to practice strumming)
◉ Solo Mode

Guitar Chords and Tabs

◉ Guitar Chords Charts Library with Chords Finder
◉ Songbook to help you learn to play guitar songs

Audio 

◉ Amazingly realistic guitar sounds

Whether you only want to learn how to play guitar chords or are a seasoned shredder you will love Real Guitar. It’s very much like the real thing in so many ways...oh, and did we mention there’s no need to change guitar strings?

Access the world's largest catalogue of guitar, bass & ukulele chords, tabs, and lyrics. Challenge yourself to learn your favourite songs and more!
 
You have choices galore:
 
• Search for songs by genre, rating, your ability, tuning level
• Explore UG Tab collections. Use the finder for your faves, fall in love with something new, feel the nostalgic vibes. Search by themes like House or Acoustic, or check out the latest album releases. Find collections based on your interests such as Star Wars or funky Bollywood beats.
• Focus on guitar techniques, find songs personal to you in collections from professional guitarists
• Anytime you feel inspired to share a song, create and upload your shot on the spot. It’s that easy! Share the best parts of your performance with your like minded community of fellow musicians.
• Reach your true musical potential – learn to play with UG Courses here. Access over 2500 lessons for any skill level and instrument type from guitar, drums to piano and more. Learn different styles and techniques with guidance from professional musicians. Progress at your own speed and on any device, anytime, anywhere.
• Play 29K+ popular songs in their original sound with Tonebridge Guitar Effects
 
And it doesn’t end there
 
Check out all these features:

Unlock the magic of playing piano with Skoove’s interactive piano lessons. 

Perfect for all levels, from beginners to advanced players…and it works with any piano or keyboard. From pop hits to classical favorites, you can play the songs you love while concepts like theory, sight-reading and technique are simply integrated into your learning naturally. Join over 2 million piano lovers already making daily progress with Skoove.

Featured by Apple, Forbes, The Guardian, Wired and more.

PIANO LESSONS THAT WORK

- Follow a trusted method crafted by expert teachers.
- Play your favorite songs from pop hits to classical favorites.
- Learn skills like music theory, note reading, and technique.
- Enjoy 500+ lessons and courses, broken down into bite-sized chunks.
- Get personal, real-time feedback…Skoove uses AI to listen to your playing.
- Practice effectively with tools like the tempo and looping features.
- Watch instructional videos for clear, simple explanations.

PLAY THE MUSIC YOU LOVE

Chart hits: John Legend, The Beatles, Coldplay, Adele and more.
Classical favorites: Bach, Beethoven, Debussy, Mozart and more.
Key skills: Learn theory, note reading, technique and more.

USE ANY PIANO OR KEYBOARD

Connect digital keyboards or pianos via USB MIDI, Bluetooth MIDI or acoustically with your device’s microphone.
Use an acoustic piano and Skoove will listen to your playing with your device’s microphone.


WHAT PEOPLE ARE SAYING

“Unlike various other music-learning apps, Skoove’s virtual guide takes the learner through each lesson and provides real-time feedback that listens to the player as they practice.” - Forbes

“Eventually, notes, keys and names fall into place – I even play four suspiciously simple bars of Bach by sight! With both hands! Success!” - The Guardian


TRY FOR FREE

Download Skoove today and try a limited number of free lessons.

dedicated_apps.description:
Hello Piano is the easiest way to learn playing keys like a pro. Your personal piano tutor for free. Download it now to find out how to comprehend theory and practice in the form of fancy games!

With Hello Piano app you can learn how to play piano well and study the theory without difficulties. Interactive learning process consists of daily challenges, which include educating games and theory lessons. The curriculum focuses on 4 main skills necessary for any piano player: rhythm, ear training, playing technique, and music sheets. By using the app for just 15 minutes a day you will get tangible results and enough skills to play the real piano.

Hello Piano is saying hello to personalized courses and video lessons! Now, you’ll be able to dive into authentic piano lessons that cater directly to you. Explore the ‘Beginners 15 Day Challenge’ and the ‘Music Fun Course,’ our first two courses complete with comprehensive video and audio guidance! Through this system, the app adapts the 'Today's Practice' module to meet your exact needs. Stay tuned because more lessons are coming soon!

***Hello Piano features***

Songbook - play to your favorite tracks, while you learn essential piano skills. It’s time to get back to the keys.

Games Mode - 4 types of games to master your piano skills
- Rhythm games for improving your sense and knowledge of rhythm: Bird Beat, Notes Value and Rhythm Time;
- Music Sheets games - Key Factor and Notes Names: match the notes to the keys and notations in the right way! 
- Playing Technique games - Play by Memory and Virtuoso: see the keys pushing and listen the notes, try to memorize and reproduce them in the right order! 
- Ear Training games - Melody Match and Note Pool: listen to the musicians playing musical instruments and try to reproduce their composition in an appropriate order. 

Theory Mode - contains all the necessary theory lessons for you to understand how to read music sheets, including notes names and length, key chart, beat types, measure, playing exercises and more.

My Stats Mode - track your learning progress with daily score stats and piano skills charts. Play hard and unlock dozens of fun achievements.

Today’s Practice mode - get your daily tasks for bringing your piano skills to the next level.

Video lessons - Comprehensive video guides to help you forge essential piano technique!

Set off on the most exciting and fun musical journey with Hello Piano!

Join over 14 million music lovers discovering piano! Learn piano the fun and easy way, no lessons needed.
Play songs, practice piano, and create music in one easy piano app.
With Piano, you can jump right in. Play to the rhythm, explore notes and chords, and create music at your own pace.

Designed for iOS (iPhone & iPad), Piano offers a smooth, responsive playing experience with intuitive touch controls, clean visuals, and a simple layout. Perfect for beginners, casual players, and anyone who wants to enjoy piano practice without pressure.

Join over 14 million music lovers discovering piano through interactive gameplay, creative tools, and realistic instrument sounds.


What You Can Do

Play to the rhythm
Follow timing cues, play step by step, and learn how songs come together.

Freestyle Keyboard
Use a full piano keyboard with real notes & chords, ideal for practicing, exploration, or composing your own melodies freely.

Responsive Touch Keys
Enjoy smooth, accurate playing with touch-sensitive keys built for a great iOS experience.

Create, Record & Share
Record your music, save your songs, and share your performances with friends. Be part of a global piano community where millions record and share every day.

Multiple Instruments
Play grand piano, electric keys, xylophone, and more. A wide range of authentic sounds.

Progress as You Play
Unlock songs, earn rewards, and move from simple tunes to more advanced arrangements.


Explore Every Genre
Play classical masterpieces, pop hits, jazz, kids' songs, film themes, and more.
Enjoy music from Mozart, Beethoven, Chopin, Tchaikovsky, Vivaldi, Bach, Strauss, and Verdi, alongside modern favorites like Bella Ciao and Twinkle Twinkle.
Search, browse, and jump into any song you want to play.

Choose Your Mode 
- Rhythm Play: Interactive gameplay to build timing, coordination, and confidence.
- Freestyle Keyboard: A realistic instrument experience for practicing chords, melodies, and musical ideas.
Both modes are powerful practice tools, helping you focus on rhythm, control, and musical expression.

Piano Pro
Upgrade to unlock the full experience:
• Unlimited songs to play
• Multiple instrument sounds
• Ad-free practice
• Record with perfect timing

• Structured Learning: Improve your typing with guided lessons covering the home row, top row, bottom row, symbols, and number keys.
• Progress Tracking: Monitor your accuracy, WPM, and high scores over time for each lesson to see your growth at a glance.

On-Device AI Text Generator & Typing Insights (Requires iOS 26 & Apple Intelligence Enabled)
• Infinite Content: Instantly generate unique, high-quality practice passages from various topics and supported languages.
• Typing Insights: Receive on-device AI analysis of your typing results, including speed insights, with deeper accuracy and consistency analysis available in Pro.
• Privacy First: All AI generation and analysis run locally on-device with zero data collection.

Detailed Typing Analytics:
• Performance Metrics: Calculates WPM (Net & Gross), Accuracy, and Consistency.
• Error Tracking: Tracks correct, incorrect, and missed characters.
• Level Progression Tracking: Earn XP from each typing session and unlock new levels as you improve.
• WPM Graph: Displays a graph over sessions to track your progress over time.
• Mistyped Keys & N-Gram Analysis: View a heatmap of your most frequent key errors and charts showing missing bigram/trigram sequences, helping you target weaknesses across keys.

Multiplayer Mode:
• Real-Time Matches: Compete in 60-second typing challenges with English text against 2–4 players.
• Play With Anyone: Invite friends directly or use automatch to quickly find opponents worldwide.
• Game Center Integration: Earn achievements and climb multiplayer leaderboards as you win matches.

VS CPU Mode:
• Race Simulated Opponents: Sharpen your typing skills by racing against AI opponents with adjustable difficulty. Choose how many CPUs to face, set their individual speeds, or let Smart Difficulty auto-tune the challenge based on your recent typing performance.

Custom Typing Text:
• Personalized Practice: Create and manage your own typing texts using your favorite quotes, song lyrics, or any text. Import directly from URL webpage

Customizable Style:
• Typography: Choose your favorite font, adjust font size, line spacing, letter spacing, line break mode, and text alignment for a personalized experience.
• Themes: Select from a curated collection to match your mood and enhance your focus.

Keyboard & Hand Guide Overlay:
• Activate the Keymap Overlay to visualize your keystrokes and next key targets in real time.
• Enable the new Hand Guide to see virtual hands showing correct finger placement — perfect for mastering 10-finger typing.

Typing Sound Effects:
• Enhance your typing experience with satisfying sound effects that simulate real keyboards. Choose from a variety of styles like mechanical switches, typewriters, or use your own sound packs.

iCloud Sync:
• Sync your comprehensive typing stats across iPhone, iPad, and macOS. Enjoy a unified experience and access your data anywhere, anytime.

Rated for ages 13+ by the Indonesia Game Rating System (IGRS)

Build habits that stick. Track routines. Crush your to-dos. All in one app.

Habit Hub is the all-in-one habit tracker, routine timer, and to-do list trusted by thousands of users with a 4.7-star rating. Whether you're building a morning routine, tracking water intake, or managing ADHD — Habit Hub keeps you focused, motivated, and on track.

SMART COLOR-CODED TIMELINE
Your habits line up by time of day — red when needs attention, yellow when upcoming, green when done. One glance tells you exactly what to do next. No overthinking. Just action.

BUILD ANY ROUTINE — TIMERS, BREATHING & TASKS
Create multi-step routines that mix and match timers, guided breathing exercises, and simple checkbox tasks in any order. Your morning routine could be: make bed (task) → 5-minute meditation (timer) → box breathing (breathing) → take vitamins (task) → 10-minute workout (timer). Hit play and flow through each step. No other app lets you combine all three.

STREAKS & TRACK RECORD
Never break your streak. See your performance by week or month with a color-coded calendar. Tap any past day to update your history. Share your progress with friends.

ONE-TIME TO-DOS
Not everything repeats. Add quick to-dos alongside your habits — reschedule, skip, or knock them out today. One app for everything.

FLEXIBLE SCHEDULING
Daily, weekly, biweekly, monthly, specific days — set any frequency. Multiple times a day (like "drink water 8x"). Goal-based tracking (like "sleep 8 hours"). Your schedule, your rules.

HOME & LOCK SCREEN WIDGETS
See your habits at a glance without opening the app. Multiple widget sizes for your home screen and lock screen.

AUTOMATIC ICLOUD SYNC
Your data syncs seamlessly across iPhone, iPad, and Mac. Never lose your progress.

WHY HABIT HUB?
• Replaces your habit tracker, routine timer, and to-do app
• ADHD-friendly — color-coded visual cues, automatic reminders, one thing at a time
• Smart repeating reminders that nudge you like a personal assistant
• Complete habits from notifications, widgets, or Siri Shortcuts

dedicated_apps.description:
HabitBull helps you organize your life! 

Easily keep track of all your habits, routines and repeated to-dos!

» Smash Through Your Goals!
HabitBull is a powerful companion which helps you keep track of your day to day habits and routines

» Fully Customizable
Measure and track anything and everything. Get notified whenever you need to do something important.

» Cut Bad Habits From Your Life
Simply start tracking bad habits like nail biting, smoking or drinking too much. Once you see the patterns, it's easier to break them. HabitBull keeps you accountable.

» Add Some Positive Habits
Want to go for a nice walk every day? Or maybe give 3 hugs every Saturday and Sunday? Join us!

» Who is it for?
Whether you want to read some more, stop smoking, start working out or even just track how many hours you wasted on Facebook, this app lets you do it! 

» HabitBull only speaks English at the moment!


» Features
•  Track multiple habits, repeated to do's or goals, each in its own calendar
•  Streak counter and percentage successful for each habit
•  Yes/No or Number goals
•  Very flexible goals like: number of times per day/week/month, only on certain days of the week etc. For example: 30 push ups every Mon-Fri, go to the gym 2 times per week, or even every 2 days
•  Inspiring quotes per category - including actual quotes from people doing it (meditation, reading, stop drinking alcohol, stop smoking cigarettes, stop procrastination etc)
•  Graphs with success percentage / streak, entered values etc
•  Powerful reminders - multiple times per day, sound and vibrate optional
•  Multi-device syncing
•  Cloud backup
•  Discussion Forums
•  Pin Lock

» How it works:
1. Set up a habit
2. Tell HabitBull how you went for a day
3. Watch your daily streak increase

Habits are no more than routines which you perform subconsciously. To build one - train yourself. To break one, find another one which is similar, yet different and nicer, and repeat it until it sticks.

To assist you with this HabitBull lets you set reminders for each habit and displays them on days when you need to be successful. This is especially useful if you have a to do list with repeating tasks or if you want to be reminded to do the same thing every day. It can also be used as a calendar planning tool or checklist, but also as a very effective repeating reminder (e.g. to drink water every 2 hours).

HabitBull does feel a little like a game in which you compete with yourself. The task is to get a long streak for the habit you are working on by covering your goals. The longer the better. It takes a couple of months to fully build a new routine, so don't give up - it takes time and if you are consistent it will work; even if it takes a few attempts.

dedicated_apps.description:
LoopCraft is your all-in-one companion for knitting success, built for crafters at every skill level—from beginners learning their first stitch to experts designing unique projects. It combines step-by-step guidance, smart tools, and AI support to turn your knitting ideas into reality.




Main Features:


•••Stitch Video Tutorials•••
Learn every technique at your own pace with clear, pauseable video tutorials. Whether you’re mastering basics like garter stitch or tackling advanced skills like cable knitting, each video breaks down steps so you can follow along easily—no more missing a detail.


•••Curated Knitting Patterns Library•••
Dive into thousands of handpicked knitting patterns (scarves, sweaters, amigurumi, and more), each paired with simple, actionable guides. Find designs that match your skill level, then follow step-by-step instructions to bring them to life.


•••Knitting PDF Parser & Manager•••
Say goodbye to messy paper patterns. Upload your knitting PDFs to LoopCraft’s built-in parser—annotate notes, zoom in on tricky sections, and store all your favorites in one easy-to-find place. Access your patterns anytime, anywhere.


•••Materials Kit Tracker•••
Never lose track of your supplies again. Log your needles, yarn, and tools in the kit manager to see exactly what’s in your stash. Check what you have before starting a new project, so you never run out mid-knit.


•••Smart Knitting Counter•••
Skip manual counting and stay on track with the handy Counter tool. It automatically tracks rows, stitches, or repeats, so you can focus on your craft instead of keeping tally—no more starting over from a mistake.


•••Ask AI for Knitting Solutions•••
Stuck on a dropped stitch? Unsure how to adjust a pattern size? Just Ask AI—LoopCraft’s smart assistant answers all your knitting questions, anytime. Get quick, clear advice to fix issues and keep your project moving.




LoopCraft isn’t just an app—it’s your partner in every knitting journey. Download now and turn every loop into a masterpiece!




Privacy Policy: https://app.loopcraftai.com/en/privacy.html
Terms of Use:  https://app.loopcraftai.com/en/agreement.html

dedicated_apps.description:
Busuu helps you communicate with confidence from day one. Combine expertly designed language lessons with feedback and tips from our global community of native speakers and harness the power of learning together. 

Looking for the best way to learn a new language on your phone? You’ve just discovered it, with Busuu, a Chegg service – we’re the app that makes learning new languages easier, more fun and more effective for all.

Whether you’re learning to get confident having new conversations, for a higher grade, a career boost, or for mind-blowing travel experiences, Busuu’s got your back.

We’re already helping millions of people overcome their learning struggles, from lack of time and motivation to problems with grammar and vocab. We help our learners achieve their goals, one milestone at a time – and we want to do the same for you.

DOWNLOAD THE APP NOW FOR FREE LANGUAGE LEARNING

================

How are we doing this? We’re glad you asked. Whether you’re learning on your iPad or iPhone, Busuu helps you…

– Learn up to 14 languages
That’s right, 14! We’ve got complete courses in English, French, Spanish, Italian, German, Chinese, Korean, Japanese, Portuguese (Brazilian), Polish, Russian, Arabic, Dutch or Turkish with Busuu. 

– Master languages with real people
You want to learn the relevant language, right? You’re in luck: we’ll connect you with our community of native speakers so you can get localized language knowledge and support. Feel even better when you help other learners in return.

– Learn from the experts
Busuu’s online courses are created by our ingenious language experts. Learn step-by-step with bite-sized lessons, plenty of practice and lots of opportunities to test your progress.

– Say hello to useful language skills
Learn the language that will really take you places! With regularly updated content, video flashcards featuring real people and useful cultural tips, you’ll be fully immersed in no time. 

– Kiss goodbye to stressful timetabling
We’re serious. We organize your learning time for you with a personalized Study Plan. Simply tell us when you want to study and for how long, and we’ll send you notifications to keep you on track.

– Revise with ease
There’ll be no forgetting on our watch. Smart Review cleverly saves all the grammar and vocab you learn in lessons and stores them in one handy place, so you can make those tricky words and rules stick.

– Show off achievements with official certificates
With our Busuu language certificates, you’ll have actual proof of your language capabilities.

– Access specialized courses for language lovers
You’ve learned the basics, and now you’re hungry for more. Learn about manga, advance your pronunciation or add travel-specific phrases to your skillset, plus much more. 

================

DON’T JUST TAKE OUR WORD FOR IT.
See what others have to say about Busuu:

● EDITOR RATING: EXCELLENT - PC MAG
● Named 'Best Buy' language learning app by the Independent in 2021
● Language Learning App of the Year at the EdTech Breakthrough Awards 2020 


================

PLEASE NOTE
A lot of the features are free, but you will need a subscription in order to get access to all features of this app. Your subscription will automatically renew unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24-hours before the end of the current payment period. Your iTunes account will be automatically charged at the same price for renewal within the 24-hour period prior to the end of the current payment period unless you change your subscription preferences in your Account Settings.
You can manage your subscriptions through your Account Settings after purchase.

Many online language learning apps will promise that you can learn a language in just a few minutes a day. However, there is a significant difference between memorizing vocabulary lists and speaking a language with confidence. Learning a language is about more than just the words. One of the mistakes new language learners make is treating language as an object or an end goal instead of as an experience.

Ditch the books, translator, and dictionary, and surround yourself with a language whenever, wherever with the Rosetta Stone mobile app. 



What are people saying about Rosetta Stone:

dedicated_apps.description:
Master 25+ languages fast! Learn Spanish, French, German, Japanese, Korean, Italian, Chinese, Russian, Portuguese, Dutch, Hindi, Kannada, Marathi, Turkish, Swedish + English fluency courses for Hindi, Spanish, German, French, Portuguese speakers. Start free today!

OUR APPROACH
• Learn First, Practice Next: We teach key grammar, vocabulary, and cultural context before you dive into quizzes. Gain real understanding instead of guessing.  
• Rich Cultural Insights: Explore history, customs, and local expressions. Language is more than words - Airlearn helps you appreciate its cultural essence.  
• Clean & Minimalist: No overblown gamification or cluttered screens. Lessons stay focused, so you can learn at your own pace without distractions.  
• Weekly Leagues & XP: Motivate yourself by competing with others studying the same language. Earn XP from each lesson and climb the leaderboard for extra fun.

WHY AIRLEARN
• Concise Lessons: Each module covers grammar rules, vocabulary, and examples in bite-sized slides.  
• Practical Dialogues: From casual greetings to deeper conversations, practice relevant situations.  
• Spaced Repetition: Lock new words into long-term memory with our smart revision approach.  
• Track Progress: Daily goals, streaks, and achievements keep your momentum alive.  
• Community Feel: Join like-minded learners, share study tips, and celebrate mutual achievements.

DIVE INTO 12 LANGUAGES
1. Spanish: Vibrant dialogues for travel, work, or fun.  
2. German: Master precise grammar for Europe’s economic hub.  
3. French: Absorb its romantic flair and cultural legacy.  
4. Italian: Savor the melodic flow and culinary charm.  
5. Dutch: Expand career options in a globalized world.  
6. Portuguese: Explore Brazil’s rich diversity or Portugal’s historic roots.  
7. Japanese: Conquer kanji, hiragana, and katakana with confidence.  
8. Korean: Learn Hangeul, K-pop phrases, and daily expressions.  
9. Chinese: Build listening and reading skills in one of the world’s most spoken tongues.  
10. Hindi: Unlock India’s cultural treasure, cinema, and business potential.  
11. English: Hone global communication for travel, work, or personal growth.  
12. Russian: Tackle Cyrillic and immerse in a language of literary tradition.

HOW IT WORKS  
1. Install Airlearn: Begin with the basics or jump into advanced modules anytime.  
2. Learn: Study essential grammar and vocabulary in short, clear lessons.  
3. Practice: Tackle engaging quizzes and drills to reinforce your knowledge.  
4. Compete: Earn XP and measure your progress in our fun Weekly League.  
5. Flourish: Speak, read, and write with newfound fluency and cultural understanding.

WHAT SETS US APART
• Genuine Learning: We prioritize understanding over memorization.  
• All Levels Welcome: From novices to pros, our modules adapt to you.  
• Regular Updates: New lessons and features keep it fresh.  
• Lifestyle Friendly: Learn anytime - during breaks, commutes, or weekends.

GET STARTED FOR FREE
Airlearn transforms language study into an immersive experience. Whether you’re planning a trip, boosting your résumé, or simply curious about global cultures, we’ll guide you step by step. Enjoy short lessons that fit smoothly into your day, gather XP, and watch your language skills skyrocket.

Join thousands of motivated learners worldwide. Download Airlearn now for Spanish, German, French, Italian, Dutch, Portuguese, Japanese, Korean, Chinese, Hindi, English, or Russian. Experience the spark of real progress, gain cultural know-how, and feel the thrill of community-powered learning. Go beyond translations - master languages in a way that truly sticks. With Airlearn, you’ll open doors to new friendships, opportunities, and an expanded worldview. Welcome to your next adventure in language mastery!

dedicated_apps.description:
Designed by experts and scientifically proven to help you learn, Uptime is an exciting way for you to spend 5 minutes immersing yourself in content that will help turn you into the smartest person in the room. Whether it’s meditation, politics, or career advice you’re after, our Hacks can have you feeling confident and well-informed across any area of your life.

WHY UPTIME?
• It’s effortlessly engaging. Our 5-minute summaries (which we call Hacks) are easy to understand, quick to get through, and cover every topic imaginable.

• We save you time. Uptime finds the world’s top non-fiction books, podcast episodes, documentaries, and online courses, and summarizes them so you can take away all the key information in a fraction of the time.

• You choose what works for you. Our content is available as text to read, audio to listen to, or as visual stories you can tap through. Whether you’re sitting down to concentrate or out on the go, Uptime is designed to suit your needs.

• We’re built for learning. Designed by experts, Uptime has a science-based methodology that’s proven to foster long-term information retention.

• We help you take action. We don’t just leave you to consume facts. Our Insights in Action provide you with tips and tricks that you can implement in your everyday life.

• Uptime helps you reach your goals. Watch your streak go up and see how many hours you’ve saved — a book might take hours, but a Hack only needs 5 minutes.

• You can bank the best bits for later. Save your favorite quotes, insights, and actions as Sparks to refer back to, and even categorize them into Boards to share with your friends.

• Our content is one of a kind. Many of our Hacks are written by the creators themselves, not only guaranteeing authenticity but offering unique insight you can’t get anywhere else. 

• We guarantee quality. We curate only the top creators – with New York Times best sellers, the latest Netflix documentaries, top-rated Apple and Spotify podcasts, and courses from the world’s most prestigious universities.


WHAT IS EVERYONE SAYING ABOUT UPTIME?
"Uptime: the app that helps you appear well-read (without actually reading). No time for those big books everyone talks about? With a new app you can grasp Hawking, Piketty and Gladwell in five minutes." – The Times

“Uptime has a crucial role to play in making education and knowledge more accessible and affordable..” – Lily Cole, author

"Read less, absorb more: Unless you have unlimited free time, you’ll never be able to consume everything that strikes your interest. Uptime provides a workaround…" – Fast Company's best new apps of 2021


TRY UPTIME PREMIUM
It's free for 7 days with no ads, unlimited content, and access to perks such as audio voice and speed selection, monthly streak repair, and deeper learning.

If you purchase Uptime Premium, payment will be charged to your Apple account. Subscriptions will automatically renew at the end of your current period, unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24 hours before the end of the subscription period. You will still have access to all your subscription features and content for the remaining time of your then-current period.

dedicated_apps.description:
Sounds, music, stories and meditations designed to help you achieve better sleep, focus, relaxation, breathing, energy levels, and more.

Sound Machine is music with a purpose. Music beyond entertainment.

More and more people are using music in very specific ways: to help pump themselves up at the gym, to focus at work, and even get better sleep.

This new genre of audio— “Functional Music” — is quietly soaring in digital popularity. You can find it dispersed across Spotify playlists, Youtube videos, popular meditation apps — but now it has a true home in Sound Machine.

We've composed a huge library of functional audio content using clinically validated techniques. Mix and match your favorite sounds, stories, music and meditations to create your perfect audio experience.


**WHAT MAKES SOUND MACHINE SPECIAL**

*World Class Sounds, Music, Stories, and Meditations*
A huge library of content built from the ground up by our own expert research and audio teams.

*Customize Everything*
Easily choose your perfect combination of sounds, stories, volumes, and narrators.

*Playlists*
Create your perfect list of audio mixes with individual timers or alarms. Mixes will transition smoothly one after another with seamless crossfades.

*Random*
Don't want to choose? Our robust "Random" feature with granular sub-categories solves the paradox of choice.

*Siri Shortcuts*
Deep Siri Shortcuts integration. Launch a mix, playlist, or random favorite from Siri Shortcuts.

*Sharing*
Share the mixes you create with friends and family.

*Audio Fusion*
Allow Sound Machine to play simultaneously with other apps. A perfect accompaniment for all sorts of Spotify songs or Youtube videos.

*Healthkit*
Track your "in bed" time or "mindful minutes" from listening to your favorite mixes.

*Reminders*
Set custom reminders to build your self care habits.

*Privacy Focused*
No ads, no marketing emails, no logins or passwords, no accounts, no crazy permissions. In the age of information intrusion, Sound Machine is specifically designed to leave you alone.

**SUBSCRIPTION AND TERMS**
When you download Sound Machine you have 7 days to try the app for free. Sound Machine offers auto-renewing yearly/monthly/weekly subscription options for on-going access to the apps features and content. Your subscription will automatically renew at the end of each term and payment will be charged through your iTunes account. You can turn off auto-renew at any time from your iTunes account settings but refunds will not be provided for any unused portion of the term. To avoid renewal, you must cancel at least 24 hours before your subscription or trial ends. Your account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period.

As with all of our apps, if you would like to use Sound Machine but have trouble affording it please email us at support@soundmachine.io so we can help you with our financial assistance program.

While we can't keep bringing great experiences to the world without making money, we know not everyone that needs access to our content can afford it, and we're happy to help.

Read more about our terms, conditions and privacy here:

https://soundmachine.io/terms.html

SOLVE THE BIGGEST LANGUAGE LEARNING FRUSTRATIONS

EXTRA BENEFITS YOU WON’T FIND ELSEWHERE

dedicated_apps.description:
**Tandem language exchange is the process of joining forces with someone who is a native speaker of the language you want to learn**

Languages are a 'learn by doing' kind of thing. This particular method is at the heart of Tandem, the global language exchange community. Connect with native speakers, start chatting and finally reach fluency in the language you’re learning!

Learn, connect, and share with 1-to-1 chats or try out Parties, the ultimate group learning audio space. There are millions of Tandem members with just as many interests, so find your people – and start speaking their language today!

Reach fluency in 300+ languages, including Spanish, English, Japanese, Korean, German, Italian, Portuguese, Russian, Simplified and Traditional Chinese, and 12 different sign languages, including American Sign Language.

Why Tandem helps you to practice and learn languages:

BOOST YOUR VOCABULARY
For the times when you’re struggling to find the correct words, our in-app translation feature helps you compose a message or translate an incoming one. 

PERFECT YOUR PRONUNCIATION
Fit in with the locals and improve your speaking skills using voice notes, audio and video calls.

GRASP THE GRAMMAR
Help each other grasp the difficult parts of language learning with our message correction and comment features.

TANDEM YOUR WAY
Forget strict schedules and learning by the book. Embrace your personal language learning style—whether that’s messaging, calling, or even meeting in person. 

DOWNLOAD TANDEM AND MASTER ANY LANGUAGE NOW!

______________

How to learn languages on Tandem:
1. Select the language(s) you want to learn in the app
2. Tell us about your language learning goals and your ideal Tandem partner
3. Search for native speakers of your target language in the community 
4. Kick-off your language exchange experience by sending your first message
5. Share topics with the Tandem community so you can have meaningful conversations about what interests you
6. Keep up the conversation with your new Tandem “pen pal” and speak like a native in no time!

While many features are free, you can choose to subscribe to Tandem Pro to access all the features on the app. Your subscription will automatically renew unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24-hours before the end of the current payment period. Your iTunes account will be automatically charged at the same price for renewal within the 24-hour period prior to the end of the current payment period unless you change your subscription preferences in your Account Settings.

 ______________

App Access Permissions:

Optional permissions:

- Location information: Required to use the Nearby feature to see members near you, the Travel feature to show members around the world and to add an approximate location to your profile.
- Microphone: Required for sending audio messages, making audio and video calls, and joining Language Parties.
- Camera: Required for taking photos to upload to your profile or post in a Language Club, take and send a photo in a chat, video calling, and scanning QR codes.
- Notifications: Used to send you notifications about acceptance into the community, new messages, new followers and their posts, new references and marketing communication.
- Nearby devices: Bluetooth access is required to connect audio devices during a call or Language Party.

You can still use Tandem without granting optional permissions, except features where their nature requires the respective permission, like a video call requiring camera permission.

Got a question? Contact us on support@tandem.net 

Licenses: Tandem – Language Exchange is licensed by Tandem Fundazioa (http://tandemcity.info) 

Privacy policy: https://tandem.net/privacy
Terms of Service: www.tandem.net/pages/termsofservice

More than 23 million learners worldwide use Lingualeo!
Lingualeo is the ultimate language-learning app — making learning English, Chinese, Czech, Dutch, French, German, Greek, Hindi, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese, Russian, Serbian, Spanish, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese and more languages  fun, interactive, and effective.
You get personalized recommendations, exercises, and vocabulary suggestions tailored perfectly to your level.
Whether you want to improve reading, speaking, writing, or listening skills, Lingualeo provides all the tools you need to reach your goals.

Why Lingualeo Stands Out:

1. Interactive Lessons and Exercises
Read books, watch videos, and explore articles in their original language. Tap unknown words to translate and save them — expand your vocabulary naturally and in context.
Our AI also helps you find content that matches your current level.

2. Leo Chat — your personal language practice buddy
Discuss any topic. 
Easy  translate and save new words. 
The chat actively uses words from your dictionary in conversations, so you can memorize them faster and learn to use fluently in practice.

3.  Thematic and Grammar Courses
Learn with engaging clips, dialogues, and scenes from popular content. 
Improve your pronunciation, listening, and speaking skills with dynamically adaptive AI-powered exercises.

4. Games and Challenges
Play interactive mini-games, test your skills, and compete with other learners. 
Gamified exercises make learning fun and highly effective.

5. Personalized Progress Tracking
Track your progress in writing, listening, speaking, and vocabulary. 
Focus on the skills that matter most to you. Leo shows your achievements and suggests the best next steps.

6. Flexible Learning
Learn anytime, anywhere — even 5 minutes a day makes a difference. 
Lingualeo adapts to your level and pace, making it perfect for both kids and adults.


Join millions of learners worldwide and turn language learning into an exciting adventure — develop new skills, explore cultures, and learn with fun thanks to Lingualeo!

Lingualeo Premium
If you choose to subscribe to Lingualeo Premium, payment will be charged to your iTunes account, and the subscription will automatically renew within 24 hours before the end of the current period.
Auto-renewal can be turned off at any time in your iTunes Store settings.

dedicated_apps.description:
Jesus Calling is your yearlong guide to living a more peaceful life. The Jesus Calling App is the mobile version of the time-tested classic packed with digital and audio features that make this daily devotional more accessible than ever. 

Experience a deeper relationship with Jesus as you savor the presence of the One who understands you perfectly and loves you forever. With Scripture and personal reflections, New York Times bestselling author Sarah Young brings Jesus' message of peace—for today and every day.

By spending time in the presence of the Savior with the much-loved devotions from Sarah Young, you will:

• Feel comforted by a daily word of hope and encouragement
• Be reassured of Jesus' unending blessings and love for you
• Receive gentle guidance based on daily Scripture readings
• Connect with Jesus further with reflection and meditation based on God’s Word

Written as if Jesus Himself is speaking directly to you, Jesus Calling invites you to experience peace in the presence of the Savior who is always with you. 

These writings are personal reflections based on Jesus’ own words of hope, guidance, and peace within Scripture—penned by one who loved Him and revered His Word. The Bible is the only infallible, inerrant Word of God, and author Sarah Young kept her writings consistent with that unchanging standard during her lifetime. She wrote from the perspective of Jesus speaking, to help readers feel more personally connected with Him. So, the first person singular (“I,” “Me,” “My,” “Mine”) always refers to Christ; “you” refers to you, the reader.

Jesus Calling’s Terms of Use are available at https://www.harpercollinschristian.com/terms/

dedicated_apps.description:
Duomo isn’t another Bible app. Instead of giving you more content to consume, it guides you step-by-step to live the Bible through small, simple actions that lead to lasting spiritual growth.

If you feel spiritually distracted, overwhelmed, or unsure how to stay close to God in daily life, Duomo offers a clearer path — one calm moment at a time.

WHY DUOMO?

1. Live the Word, don’t just read it
We don’t give you more content to consume. We give you daily actions that help you practice patience, gratitude, forgiveness, and faithfulness in real life—one small step at a time.

2. Experience Scripture with clarity
Duomo helps the Bible make sense for your season of life. When a verse clicks, it doesn’t just inform you—it transforms you.

3. Create habits that bring peace
Your personalized plan turns spiritual insight into daily rhythms: morning prayer, Scripture, reflection, an action to try, and gratitude.

Simple steps. Consistent growth. No pressure.

WHAT YOU’LL FIND IN DUOMO

Duomo guides you through the areas of life where your faith meets your lived reality — marriage, purpose, work, parenthood, healing, relationships, and more.

Your daily path includes:
- Daily prayers to begin with God’s presence
- Today’s Scripture with clear, practical meaning for your real struggles
- One small action to turn the verse into a habit
- A short reflection to reconnect with God’s love
- A daily quiz to deepen your understanding
- Chapter summaries and progress tracking to celebrate growth without shame

Every piece of the journey is crafted to quiet anxious noise, restore peace, and bring your life back into alignment with the heart of God.

WHO DUOMO IS FOR

- People seeking a stronger daily spiritual routine
- Those returning to faith after burnout or drift
- Anyone longing for peace, clarity, and a deeper connection with God
- Believers who want Scripture to shape their habits — not just their knowledge

Subscription Info
Duomo is a paid-access app. All features are available through in-app subscription. A free trial is offered so you can experience the journey before committing.

Walk the Path With Us. Wherever you’re starting — from spiritual drift, burnout, curiosity, or long-term discipleship — Duomo walks beside you.

One verse.
One action.
One day at a time.

Let’s grow closer to God together — step by step.

dedicated_apps.description:
Echo exists to help you pray. 

We believe that prayer is a powerful and effective way for us to connect with God. If you're anything like us, the biggest obstacles that keep you from praying are difficulty organizing or keeping a list of your prayers, and then actually remembering to pray for those things when life gets busy. Echo was created to solve these problems, and to give you space to engage with your Creator.

We want to help you pray without ceasing.

“Rejoice always, pray without ceasing, give thanks in all circumstances;
for this is the will of God in Christ Jesus for you.” - 1 Thessalonians 5:16-18


+ + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + +


KEEP TRACK OF ALL YOUR PRAYERS

Echo lets you keep a list of every single one of your prayers. You can add as many prayers as you want, categorize them, delete old prayers, and even mark prayers as answered so you can see how God is working (and remember to thank Him!).


SHARE PRAYER REQUESTS WITH OTHERS

You have the ability to share prayer requests with other individuals or groups. Share prayers with friends and family privately, or create a group to communicate together. Sharing works great for small groups or focused communities committing to pray for each other throughout the week.


REMIND YOURSELF TO PRAY

You can easily set up push notifications or emails to remind you to pray for your prayers, prayers that others have shared with you, or prayers from your groups. Reminders help you engage with God throughout the week, even when you find yourself busy with life.


PRAY WITHOUT DISTRACTION

Echo gives you the ability to "Pray Now" which gives you a clear, focused way to pray. Choose what you would like to pray for and optionally set a timer for how long you want to pray. 


NOTIFY PEOPLE WHEN YOU’VE PRAYED FOR THEM

After praying for someone, send out a notification to let them know you’ve prayed for their shared prayer. You get the option of sending out a message of encouragement after praying for them in the “Pray Now” portion of the app.


FOLLOW & PRAY FOR YOUR MINISTRY

With Echo Feeds, you can follow any ministry and pray for them! If you are a church or ministry, replace your old-school prayer chain or email list with a platform that is beautiful, organized, powerful and instant. Send real-time updates to your network, and connect your community in prayer.


+ + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + +


Echo Plus+ Membership

We offer many features for free, but to access all the features in Echo, you will need a paid subscription. It's an in-app purchase that renews monthly or yearly (your choice), and starts with a 14-day free trial. 

Learn more about Echo Plus+ here: https://new.echoprayer.com/echo-plus

Payment will be charged to your Apple ID account at the confirmation of purchase. The subscription automatically renews unless it is canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. Your account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period. You can manage and cancel your subscriptions by going to your App Store account settings after purchase. Any unused portion of a free trial period for a publication will be forfeited when you purchase a subscription to that publication (this isn't applicable to Echo, but we have to include it in the fine print anyway).

Terms of service: https://new.echoprayer.com/legal/terms-of-service


+ + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + +


Prayer connects us.

There is something beautiful and exciting that happens when we see God answer prayers.
As we see prayers answered, our faith gets stronger, which in turn causes us to pray even more and feel even more empowered to share what God is doing.

We’d love to connect with you and your story. Feel free to interact with us on Twitter, Facebook, or email:


Instagram: @echoprayer

Email: contact@echoprayer.com

dedicated_apps.description:
“God’s first word is silence.”
-Thomas Keating
 
Centering Prayer is a method of silent prayer that prepares us to receive the gift of contemplative prayer, prayer in which we experience God's presence within us, closer than breathing, closer than thinking, closer than consciousness itself. This method of prayer is both a relationship with God and a discipline to foster that relationship. Centering Prayer is not meant to replace other kinds of prayer; rather it casts a new light and depth of meaning on them.  Centering Prayer is an ancient method of Christian prayer adapted for modern times by Fathers Thomas Keating, William Meninger and Basil Pennington.
 
The Centering Prayer application will support your daily prayer practice commitment.  Beautiful and peaceful, the app includes an adjustable timer, as well as opening and closing prayer options that you may read before and after your silent prayer time.  An assortment of sounds and backgrounds allow you to choose the type of environment you want to create for your prayer time.  Brief instructions for learning Centering Prayer are also included. 
 
It is recommended you practice being in relationship with God through Centering Prayer twice a day for 20 minutes to begin with.

dedicated_apps.description:
We built Practice Devo for ourselves. Today, we are easily distracted and often forget to create spaces to dive deeper in our walk with God. Sometimes the best way to start is to keep it simple.

Practice Devo is a completely free, ad-free, simple, easy, 365 daily devotional for both men and women, designed to capture our hearts and minds for a few moments of our busy day. Choose to dive deeper with our brand new podcast featuring believers all over the world sharing their insights from the word of the day.

• Word of the Day:  Each day we share a meaningful word to lay the groundwork for the day's devotion.

• Definition: We've heard some of these words countless times and sometimes, as a result they began to lose their meaning. We go back to the root definition to remind ourselves that words do have meaning.

• Scripture: We believe ".. the word of God is living and active, sharper than any two-edged sword, piercing to the division of soul and of spirit, of joints and of marrow, and discerning the thoughts and intentions of the heart." (Hebrews 4:12-13). God's Word is living, active and shapes us. Reflect on Scripture that follows the theme of the day.

• Practice: Devotionals are nothing without application. Our hope is that together we can become people of these words through practice and intentional living.

• Prayer: Lastly, we share a prayer to guide us as we seek to become more like Jesus Christ.

• Widgets

• Save your Favorites
• Dark mode

dedicated_apps.description:
HabitBull helps you organize your life! 

Easily keep track of all your habits, routines and repeated to-dos!

» Smash Through Your Goals!
HabitBull is a powerful companion which helps you keep track of your day to day habits and routines

» Fully Customizable
Measure and track anything and everything. Get notified whenever you need to do something important.

» Cut Bad Habits From Your Life
Simply start tracking bad habits like nail biting, smoking or drinking too much. Once you see the patterns, it's easier to break them. HabitBull keeps you accountable.

» Add Some Positive Habits
Want to go for a nice walk every day? Or maybe give 3 hugs every Saturday and Sunday? Join us!

» Who is it for?
Whether you want to read some more, stop smoking, start working out or even just track how many hours you wasted on Facebook, this app lets you do it! 

» HabitBull only speaks English at the moment!


» Features
•  Track multiple habits, repeated to do's or goals, each in its own calendar
•  Streak counter and percentage successful for each habit
•  Yes/No or Number goals
•  Very flexible goals like: number of times per day/week/month, only on certain days of the week etc. For example: 30 push ups every Mon-Fri, go to the gym 2 times per week, or even every 2 days
•  Inspiring quotes per category - including actual quotes from people doing it (meditation, reading, stop drinking alcohol, stop smoking cigarettes, stop procrastination etc)
•  Graphs with success percentage / streak, entered values etc
•  Powerful reminders - multiple times per day, sound and vibrate optional
•  Multi-device syncing
•  Cloud backup
•  Discussion Forums
•  Pin Lock

» How it works:
1. Set up a habit
2. Tell HabitBull how you went for a day
3. Watch your daily streak increase

Habits are no more than routines which you perform subconsciously. To build one - train yourself. To break one, find another one which is similar, yet different and nicer, and repeat it until it sticks.

To assist you with this HabitBull lets you set reminders for each habit and displays them on days when you need to be successful. This is especially useful if you have a to do list with repeating tasks or if you want to be reminded to do the same thing every day. It can also be used as a calendar planning tool or checklist, but also as a very effective repeating reminder (e.g. to drink water every 2 hours).

HabitBull does feel a little like a game in which you compete with yourself. The task is to get a long streak for the habit you are working on by covering your goals. The longer the better. It takes a couple of months to fully build a new routine, so don't give up - it takes time and if you are consistent it will work; even if it takes a few attempts.

Yearly Subscription
• 1 Year of premium access, first Week is completely free
• Payment will be charged to iTunes Account at confirmation of purchase

• Any unused portion of a free trial period, if offered, will be forfeited when the user purchases a subscription to that publication, where applicable

dedicated_apps.description:
Ever Accountable is a next-generation accountability app that helps you stay safe, honest, and in control of your digital life. It uses on-device AI. No VPN. And it now works across popular social, sharing, and others apps—beyond just web browsing.

Most accountability tools only protect web activity and leave major apps uncovered. Ever Accountable closes those gaps so you can use your iPhone normally while knowing you’re protected in the places where slip-ups are most likely to happen. You choose who gets reports and what detail.

You stay in control: use your iPhone normally—without locking it down or breaking everyday apps.

Ever Accountable is strong against loopholes that undermine accountability. 

Our on-device AI detects sensitive or potentially unsafe content in real time and can show gentle warnings that help you pause and stay grounded.

Weekly reports are simple and clear, showing incident duration, severity levels, and summaries that support honest, productive conversations. You decide who receives reports and how much detail they include, ensuring accountability feels supportive rather than restrictive.

Ever Accountable uses on-device processing. No VPN. We are certified to ISO 27001 and ISO 27701 for security and privacy. One subscription covers all your devices and includes a 14-day free trial.

If you’re ready for real accountability that works everywhere you need it — without shutting your phone down or leaving loopholes open — Ever Accountable gives you protection and freedom together.

Build healthier habits with protection where it matters most.

Busuu helps you communicate with confidence from day one. Combine expertly designed language lessons with feedback and tips from our global community of native speakers and harness the power of learning together. 

Looking for the best way to learn a new language on your phone? You’ve just discovered it, with Busuu, a Chegg service – we’re the app that makes learning new languages easier, more fun and more effective for all.

Whether you’re learning to get confident having new conversations, for a higher grade, a career boost, or for mind-blowing travel experiences, Busuu’s got your back.

We’re already helping millions of people overcome their learning struggles, from lack of time and motivation to problems with grammar and vocab. We help our learners achieve their goals, one milestone at a time – and we want to do the same for you.

DOWNLOAD THE APP NOW FOR FREE LANGUAGE LEARNING

================

How are we doing this? We’re glad you asked. Whether you’re learning on your iPad or iPhone, Busuu helps you…

– Learn up to 14 languages
That’s right, 14! We’ve got complete courses in English, French, Spanish, Italian, German, Chinese, Korean, Japanese, Portuguese (Brazilian), Polish, Russian, Arabic, Dutch or Turkish with Busuu. 

– Master languages with real people
You want to learn the relevant language, right? You’re in luck: we’ll connect you with our community of native speakers so you can get localized language knowledge and support. Feel even better when you help other learners in return.

– Learn from the experts
Busuu’s online courses are created by our ingenious language experts. Learn step-by-step with bite-sized lessons, plenty of practice and lots of opportunities to test your progress.

– Say hello to useful language skills
Learn the language that will really take you places! With regularly updated content, video flashcards featuring real people and useful cultural tips, you’ll be fully immersed in no time.

dedicated_apps.description:
Learn languages fluently with Pimsleur - Learn to speak 50+ foreign languages like a local with just 30 minutes of language learning practice a day!

The Pimsleur Method™ is the most effective way to learn a foreign language, achieve native conversational fluency, and use the language in your everyday life. Learn to speak fluent Spanish, French, Korean, German, Chinese, Arabic, Japanese and more with ease. Pimsleur’s language learning resources make learning a language fun, flexible and rewarding. Practice speaking fluently with just 30 minutes of language practice a day! 

For 50 years, we’ve been helping people rapidly learn languages in 30 days. Want to learn Spanish to speak to Mexican friends? Need to learn Japanese for a trip to Tokyo? Choose from over 50 languages to learn while driving, at the gym, or while cooking. No Internet needed with offline mode. Plus the built-in hands-free mode makes it easy to learn a new language anywhere, anytime, even in the car!

Our innovative online audio lessons focus on enhancing your vocabulary, pronunciation and speaking skills without the burden of grammar tables, making language learning and practice enjoyable and accessible. Dive into cultural topics that enrich your understanding and language fluency, and join thousands of adults who have transformed their language skills online with Pimsleur.

Whether you're a beginner or already looking to improve your language fluency, Pimsleur offers a convenient and effective online language learning platform for adults designed for a flexible study schedule that fits into your daily routine. Learn to speak a new language anytime, anywhere - even in the car as a family. 

Why Choose Pimsleur as Your Language Partner?
- Scientifically proven method for fast, lasting language fluency.
- Just 30 minutes a day to speak a new foreign language with confidence.
- Learn languages offline, hands-free, and without distractions, no Wi-Fi needed.
- Perfect your pronunciation and practice real conversations with a smart AI language tutor. 
- Sync across devices to track your progress and keep your learning streak going.
- Join the global community of Pimsleur language learners!

Discover the full list of language courses here: Albanian, Eastern, Egyptian or Modern Standard Arabic, Eastern or Western Armenian, Cantonese or Mandarin Chinese, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dari Persian, Dutch, Farsi Persian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Haitian Creole, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Icelandic, Indonesian, Irish, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Lithuanian, Norwegian, Ojibwe, Pashto, Polish, European or Brazilian Portuguese, Punjabi, Romanian, Russian, Latin American or Spain-Castilian Spanish, Swahili, Swedish, Swiss German, Tagalog, Thai, Turkish, Twi, Ukrainian, Urdu, Vietnamese.

FREE TRIAL AVAILABLE
Don’t miss out - try Pimsleur for FREE and start learning different languages today! With a complimentary lesson in 51 languages, you'll experience the most effective way to achieve conversational fluency from Day 1.

PREMIUM FEATURES
CORE CONVERSATIONAL LANGUAGE LEARNING LESSONS
Enjoy 30-minute conversational language lessons anywhere. Quickly learn to speak another language in just 30 days!

READ
You won’t just learn foreign languages; you'll learn to read without sacrificing speaking skills!

SPEAK
Don't be shy! Learn to speak fluently with conversation partner role-play & review transcripts using AI language learning & voice recognition. Now available for Spanish learners.

SKILLS
Practice phrases by topic & learn easily with visual language learning through vocabulary flashcards. Learn foreign languages with Quick Match & Speed Rounds.

SYNC PROGRESS
Track learning progress across different devices, sync & stream offline with no ads.

Feature availability depends on the language. Visit our website for more info & a complete list of the different languages available.
